newRepos.name: oskarirauta/homey-owon-driver
newRepos.description: OWON THS317-ET ZigBee Driver (non-tuya version) for Homey

aiPlan:
Here’s a summary of unsupported firmware profiles (FPs) along with suggested drivers and capability mappings, as well as an assessment of new repositories for integration.

### Unsupported Firmware Profiles

| FP                  | PIDs                | Suggested Driver         | DP → Capability Map | Repositories                                   | Issues | Code Refs | Confidence |
|---------------------|---------------------|--------------------------|---------------------|------------------------------------------------|--------|-----------|------------|
| _TZE200_dtzziy1e    | TS0601              | Zigbee Switch Driver     | 1 → On/Off          | wzwenzhi/Wenzhi-ZigBee2mqtt, kkossev/Hubitat | 0      | 8         | 80         |
| _TYZB01_pbgpvhgx    | TS0210, TS0601      | Zigbee Sensor Driver     | 1 → Temperature      | kkossev/Hubitat                               | 0      | 3         | 50         |
| _TZ3000_hwnphliv    | TS0001, TS0049      | Zigbee Light Driver      | 1 → Brightness       | kkossev/Hubitat                               | 0      | 2         | 45         |
| _TZ3000_srldgdxz    | TS0001, TS0049      | Zigbee Light Driver      | 1 → Brightness       | kkossev/Hubitat                               | 0      | 2         | 45         |
| _TZE200_yltivvzb     | TS0601              | Zigbee Lock Driver       | 1 → Lock/Unlock      | nikzori/gidrolock_guides                      | 0      | 3         | 40         |

### New Repositories Assessment

| Repository Name                          | Stars | Description                                      | Integration Value Assessment |
|------------------------------------------|-------|--------------------------------------------------|------------------------------|
| kodalissri/com.MyZigbee.Devices         | 0     | Homey App for Tuya Devices                       | Moderate - Potential for integration with Tuya devices, but lacks popularity and community support. |
| oskarirauta/homey-owon-driver           | 0     | OWON THS317-ET ZigBee Driver (non-tuya version) | Low - Focused on non-Tuya devices, limited relevance for Tuya integration. |

### Summary
The unsupported firmware profiles indicate a need for specific drivers to enable functionality, particularly in the areas of switches, sensors, and lights. The repositories listed show potential but vary in their relevance to Tuya device integration. The suggested drivers aim to bridge the gap for unsupported devices, enhancing compatibility and user experience.
